---
title: "Composer"
author: "241 Final"
#date: "5/9/2021"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
source("../R/header.R")
source("composer.R")
.src(d = 1)
```

```{r}
# Find the list of bach pieces
bach_files <- find_composer_scores("bach")
bach_files
```

```{r}
# Get the kern dataframe for a piece
bach <- composer_score("bach", bach_scores[1])
# Once the above code works, get all the bach pieces
bach_scores <- byComposer(composer = "bach")
```
